scores.notes: Minor OCR errors like '15261im' instead of '1526lm', '4000K' instead of '4000K', '180°' instead of '180°', '5y years' instead of '5 years', 'High-efficiencyl' instead of 'High-efficiency', 'compacts' instead of 'compact', 'industrial andi industrial' instead of 'industrial and industrial'. The table structure is well-preserved, and numeric data is mostly accurate with only a few minor character misinterpretations.
